_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin deficiency-associated transcriptional dysregulation suggests a novel therapy for tibial pseudoarthrosis in NF1.

_contextSnippet: WES identified the constitutional NF1 mutation in 15 of 16 individuals, which predicted missense (n=3), nonsense (n=4), frameshift (n=3) and splice-site (n=5) changes
details: Successfully identified constitutional NF1 mutations in 15 of 16 individuals through whole-exome sequencing
